name: Junie (JetBrains AI Coding Agent)
description: AI coding agent from JetBrains that executes complex tasks and provides fine-grained control for human-computer interaction in JetBrains IDEs. Now publicly available to all JetBrains customers with support for IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PyCharm Pro, WebStorm, and GoLand.
community_quotes: Now publicly available to all JetBrains customers
Designed to execute more complex tasks with finer-grained control for human-computer interaction
Compatible with IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PyCharm Pro, WebStorm, and GoLand

name: JetBrains AI Free Tier
description: New free tier from JetBrains offering unlimited code completion, access to local AI models, and credit-based cloud AI assistance with 30 days of AI Pro access. All JetBrains AI tools are now available through a single subscription starting from the 2025.1 version.
community_quotes: All JetBrains AI tools now available through a single subscription
Unlimited code completion with local AI models
Included in all IDE licenses with 30 days of AI Pro access
